name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: manual reconciliation is time-consuming and error-prone.
